resource_notes.change: Only the all64 down stage is shape-specialized. For hidden=7168 it uses down_block_token=32, down_threads=256, and four down child CTAs per padded parent-128 block. For hidden=2048 the derived values remain M64, 512 threads, and two child CTAs. Gate/up remains M64, 512 threads, N-pack=2; down N-pack=2 and swizzle=8 are unchanged.
resource_notes.mapping: For hidden=7168, parent_bx=bx//4, tile_id=bx%4, and block_start=parent_bx*128+tile_id*32. routed_expert_weights remains indexed by raw_start+token_offset+i, while up_logits/out remain indexed by padded block_start+i.
resource_notes.boundary_correctness: Directed H7168/I256/experts4/valid515/random-groups seed=1 compiled and allclosed. total_padded=640, max_abs_error=0.000244140625, mean_abs_error=5.6006988415902015e-06.
resource_notes.formal_correctness: Formal point 2 allclosed with max_abs_error=0.0009765625 and mean_abs_error=1.0882066817430314e-05.
resource_notes.test_protocol: Formal point 2 used warmup=10, iters=100, seed=81394 on server-64-1.
resource_notes.resources: Compilation succeeded with no OOM, shared-memory-limit, spill, or runtime-resource error reported. Down shared-memory allocation is unchanged from the baseline pack=2 kernel; the only diagnostic was the pre-existing TileLang PDL warning for the MACA target.
resource_notes.early_stop: Formal point 2 regressed by 10.21649%, exceeding the 1% rejection threshold. Point 3 was not run, and no M128/512 variant was scanned.
